name: NEAR DROWNING
definition: asphyxiation ← water inhalation followed by survival for a minimum of 24 hour laryngospasm + swallowing of water into the stomach
discriminating_features: permeability edema ← hypoxia + diffuse alveolar damage

general: permeability edema ← hypoxia + diffuse alveolar damage
central extensive fluffy areas of increased opacity (alveolar edema indistinguishable from
hyaline membrane formation = considerable loss of protein from blood

clinical.Cx: ARDS, aspiration of gastric fluid, infection by fresh-water saprophytic bacteria
